title: funkia japonica var. subcordata
intro: Funkia japonica var. subcordata, also known as Japanese Funkia or Pogostemon cablin, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Funkia japonica var. subcordata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory problems such as asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and essential oil, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
